title: Argentinian Stir Fry Chicken
description: A Chinese-inspired dish made with marinated chicken, savory vegetables, and a hint of argentinian spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-5 minutes.
Add the broccoli and garlic to the skillet and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the savory sauce and argentinian seasoning.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
